  • Uses of ExtendedConsumerProperties in org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder

    Subinterfaces with type arguments of type ExtendedConsumerProperties in org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ExtendedPropertiesBinder<T,C,P>
    Extension of Binder that takes ExtendedConsumerProperties and ExtendedProducerProperties as arguments.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    KafkaMessageChannelBinder
    A Binder that uses Kafka as the underlying middleware.
    Methods in org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka with parameters of type ExtendedConsumerProperties
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    KafkaListenerContainerCustomizer.configure(org.springframework.kafka.listener.AbstractMessageListenerContainer<?,?> container, String destinationName, String group, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> extendedConsumerProperties)
    Configure the Kafka listener container with access to extended consumer properties.
    default void
    ListenerContainerWithDlqAndRetryCustomizer.configure(org.springframework.kafka.listener.AbstractMessageListenerContainer<?,?> container, String destinationName, String group, BiFunction<org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord<?,?>, Exception, org.apache.kafka.common.TopicPartition> dlqDestinationResolver, org.springframework.util.backoff.BackOff backOff, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> extendedConsumerProperties)
    API method for configuring the container that also gives access to the ExtendedConsumerProperties for the binding.
    protected org.springframework.integration.core.MessageProducer
    KafkaMessageChannelBinder.createConsumerEndpoint(ConsumerDestination destination, String group, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> extendedConsumerProperties)
     
    protected org.springframework.kafka.core.ConsumerFactory<?,?>
    KafkaMessageChannelBinder.createKafkaConsumerFactory(boolean anonymous, String consumerGroup, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> consumerProperties, String beanName, String destination)
     
    protected AbstractMessageChannelBinder.PolledConsumerResources
    KafkaMessageChannelBinder.createPolledConsumerResources(String name, String group, ConsumerDestination destination, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> extendedConsumerProperties)
     
    protected org.springframework.messaging.MessageHandler
    KafkaMessageChannelBinder.getErrorMessageHandler(ConsumerDestination destination, String group, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> properties)
     
    protected org.springframework.messaging.MessageHandler
    KafkaMessageChannelBinder.getPolledConsumerErrorMessageHandler(ConsumerDestination destination, String group, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> properties)
     
    void
    KafkaMessageChannelBinder.setupRebalanceListener(ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> extendedConsumerProperties, org.springframework.kafka.listener.ContainerProperties containerProperties)
